title: Additional Fruits
description: Adds new fruits to Minecraft in a vanilla way.
body:
Now each type of leaves in Minecraft drops its own fruit. In addition, the fruit drop rate is greatly increased.


You can also make golden versions of new fruits that give their own effect for 5 seconds, instead of the standard regeneration from golden apples. 



New fruits can also be found in dungeons, bought from farmers or wandering traders and can be used in composters.

The mod is translated into Ukrainian and Russian languages.
